zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Juliane FitzMaurice於大約1263年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林時，她的父親Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly46歲，母親Maud or Matilda de Prendergast22歲。她於1275年2月與Sir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomond在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年9月24日在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾堂蒙德享年38歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Juliane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Julieann
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Julieanne
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Juliane FitzMaurice was born about 1263, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, her father, Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly, was 46 and her mother, Maud or Matilda de Prendergast, was 22. She married Sir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomond in February 1275, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 September 1300, in Thomond, County Clare, Ireland, at the age of 38, and was buried in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Juliane FitzMaurice est née environ 1263, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, son père, Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Maud or Matilda de Prendergast, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomond en février 1275, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 septembre 1300, à Thomond, County Clare, Irlande, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Juliane FitzMaurice um 1263 in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly 46 und ihre Mutter Maud or Matilda de Prendergast 22. Sie hat im Februar 1275 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. September 1300 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Thomond, County Clare, Irland und wurde in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Juliane FitzMaurice è nata il circa 1263 nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, sua padre, Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Maud or Matilda de Prendergast, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomond nel febbraio 1275, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 settembre 1300, nel Thomond, County Clare, Irlanda, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane FitzMauriceが約1263年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで生まれた時，父Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offalyは46歳，母Maud or Matilda de Prendergastは22歳であった。1275年2月にイギリスイギリスエセックスでSir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年9月24日にアイルランドコウントイ クラーソモンドで38歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Juliane FitzMaurice(이)가 대략 1263년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud or Matilda de Prendergast(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1275년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Sir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 9월 24일 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 톰드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Juliane FitzMaurice nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Maud or Matilda de Prendergast, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomond em fevereiro de 1275, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1300, em Thomond, County Clare, Irlanda, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Juliane FitzMaurice родилась около 1263 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud or Matilda de Prendergast, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Clare 1st Lord of Thomond февраль 1275 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 сентября 1300 г. в местности томонд, коунти клар, Ирландия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия.
